title: Retroactive spawn-packet — decide-app runnable Mac app shell
spawnVariantRationale: Matrix-solver verdict: SINGLETON · spawn-runnable-app (constraint-determined). The medium-weight variant is the constraint-determined answer per the typed audit trail at tests/constraint-solver-tests/fixtures/spawn-workstream-for-runnable-app-shell.json. Operator can re-run the matrix-solver to verify.
violationAcknowledgment: Authored without invoking the canonical spawn-software-workstream prospectively. This packet is the retroactive substrate-doctrinal repair.

spawned.shape: SwiftPM executable target (no xcodeproj). @main SwiftUI App with NavigationSplitView 4-pane shell. macOS-only at this cut.

designTruth.designTruthShape: four-pane NavigationSplitView + HSplitView, all panes bound to one DecideStore
designTruth.liveResolveClaim: Matrix-solver re-runs on every store mutation. Operator sees the verdict update LIVE as they edit any pane. Window subtitle carries the verdict for cross-pane visibility.

ldtProofs.knownGap: decide-app ships without LDT proofs — substrate-doctrinal debt named here. Smoke tests for the @main App's view composition + the NavigationSplitView shape are a follow-up bead. The substrate-doctrinal rationale for shipping without tests THIS TURN: decide-app composes already-LDT-proven typed primitives (decide-kit + constraint-solver); the view-composition layer is a thin shell. swift build passing is the substrate-canonical minimum gate.

launchReviewGate.operatorRunnable: swift run … decide-app opens the Mac window
launchReviewGate.knownDebt: no smoke test for the SwiftUI view composition; no Info.plist; no proper Mac app bundle

maintenanceHandoff.supersessionPolicy: Likely supersession path: graduate from SwiftPM executable to a proper Mac app target (project.yml + xcodeproj) under wrkstrm-core/private/apple/apps/decide/ when the consumer surface needs sandboxing, signing, App Store distribution, or auto-deploy.

monitoringPosture.compileRegressions: Surface via decide-kit + constraint-solver test runs + decide-app swift build in CI
monitoringPosture.viewRegressions: Currently unmonitored — the substrate-doctrinal repair is to add smoke tests OR ship a Mac app target with proper UI snapshot testing
